description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building with a rectangular footprint, set on a large grassy plot. The structure features a prominent, moderately sloped gable roof covered in gray tiles, extending over the front and rear facades. The exterior walls are finished in a light color, with several rectangular windows distributed along the sides and front, providing ample natural light. A paved walkway leads to the main entrance, which is slightly recessed and marked by a wooden door. The property includes a paved driveway area adjacent to the house, and there are two signboards or utility structures positioned near one corner of the lot. The overall design is simple and functional, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on practicality.
description: A single-story bungalow with a gray gable roof, light-colored walls, and multiple rectangular windows, set on a grassy lot with a paved walkway and driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, three windows, and the paved walkway leading to the door.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting two windows and the back facade, with signboards visible to the left.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the driveway, side entrance, and additional windows along the wall.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a large blank wall, the paved driveway, and signboards in the foreground.
